lambda.eventsourcemapping.selfmanagedkaf: Specific configuration settings for a self-managed Apache Kafka event source.

lambda.eventsourcemapping.selfmanagedkaf.Description: The identifier for the Kafka consumer group to join. The consumer group ID must be unique among all your Kafka event sources. After creating a Kafka event source mapping with the consumer group ID specified, you cannot update this value. For more information, see [Customizable consumer group ID](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/lambda/latest/dg/with-msk.html#services-msk-consumer-group-id).
